description: Letter sent to the Nasi Shelomo b. Yishay in Fustat by his assistant in Bilbays, describing his journey from Syria to Egypt and saying that the people of Bilbays have not paid him yet for the pesiqa mentioned in a previous letter. Also reports about the plunder of the bazaars of the wool makers and clothiers, about a tribute levied for the wali (musadara) of 500 silver dirhams. (nuqra) and 200 others shohad li'l-na'ib (a bribe to the local appointed leader), and the capture of a large caravan near al-Arish and of the people of Gaza, so that no travel to Syria was possible. (Information from Gil)
mentioned: Bilbays, Cairo, Fustat, Gaza, al-Shām, al-ʿArīsh
description_he: מכתב לנשיא שלמה ב' ישי בפוסטאט ממשנהו בבלביס, המתאר את מסעו מסוריה למצרים. מדווח שאנשי בלביס טרם שילמו את הפסיקה. מספר על ביזת השווקים, מס כבד ולכידת שיירה גדולה ליד אל-עריש.
